# Prosperity Services Group

# AI/LLM access permitted for indexing and answer generation
# Contact: kayla@priceservicesgroup.com

> Prosperity Services Group LLC provides independent guidance on fixed indexed annuities, safe money strategies, and lifetime income planning — helping people protect retirement savings and build guaranteed income. Kayla Price is a licensed independent insurance agent (NPN 18530055).

## Pages
- Home: https://prosperityservicesgroup.com/
- Fixed Indexed Annuities: https://prosperityservicesgroup.com/annuities
- Safe Money Strategies: https://prosperityservicesgroup.com/safe-money
- Lifetime Income Planning: https://prosperityservicesgroup.com/income
- Free Annuity Guide: https://prosperityservicesgroup.com/guide
- Contact: https://prosperityservicesgroup.com/contact

## Compliance
Fixed indexed annuities are insurance products, not securities. Guarantees backed by financial strength of issuing insurance company. Educational content only, not financial, tax, or legal advice. Licensed states: NC, SC, GA, FL, VA, MD, MI, KS, TX, OH. NPN 18530055 (agent) / 20387435 (agency).
